title: A small habit I have every day
summary: Describe one small daily ritual and when you do it.
topic: A small habit I have every day
prompt: Write 6–8 short sentences about one small habit you do every day. Use present simple and adverbs of frequency.
sampleText: I have one small habit every day, and I love it. After I wake up, I sit on my balcony in Buenos Aires for five minutes. I do not check my phone yet. I just sit on a wooden chair and look at the building across the street. The street is quiet at this hour, and I can see one neighbor water her plants. I take three deep breaths, and I drink a small glass of water. Then I open my notebook and write one short line about how I feel. Sometimes the line is happy, and sometimes the line is sad. I never write more than one sentence. I light a small candle in the kitchen, and the candle smell is sweet. This small habit takes only ten minutes, but it makes me calm before the busy day. I started this habit two years ago because my work was stressful. I rarely miss a day, even when I travel. A small daily ritual gives me a clear start.

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Present simple for daily habits
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng thì hiện tại đơn để miêu tả thói quen hằng ngày: 'I sit', 'I take', 'I drink'.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Use the present simple for daily habits, like 'I sit on a wooden chair' and 'I take three deep breaths'.

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Adverbs of frequency
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: 'never', 'rarely', 'sometimes', 'always' come before the main verb, as in 'I never write more than one sentence'.

sampleTranslationVi: Tôi có một thói quen nhỏ mỗi ngày, và tôi rất thích nó. Sau khi thức dậy, tôi ngồi trên ban công ở Buenos Aires khoảng năm phút. Tôi chưa kiểm tra điện thoại. Tôi chỉ ngồi trên một chiếc ghế gỗ và nhìn tòa nhà bên kia đường. Đường phố giờ này yên tĩnh, và tôi thấy một người hàng xóm đang tưới cây. Tôi hít ba hơi sâu và uống một ly nước nhỏ. Sau đó tôi mở sổ tay và viết một câu ngắn về cảm xúc của mình. Đôi khi câu đó vui, đôi khi câu đó buồn. Tôi không bao giờ viết hơn một câu. Tôi thắp một cây nến nhỏ trong bếp, và mùi nến ngọt dịu. Thói quen nhỏ này chỉ tốn mười phút, nhưng làm tôi bình tâm trước ngày bận rộn. Tôi bắt đầu thói quen này hai năm trước vì công việc rất áp lực. Tôi hiếm khi bỏ ngày nào, kể cả khi đi xa. Một nghi thức nhỏ mỗi ngày giúp tôi có một khởi đầu rõ ràng.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which sentence shows a daily habit?
options: I sat on the balcony yesterday once.
Every day, I sit on the balcony for five minutes.
Balcony I yesterday sitting was.
I will sit balcony five minutes.
mcQuestions.explanation: 'Every day' + present simple shows a habit.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the present simple with 'every day'.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which sentence uses an adverb of frequency correctly?
options: I never write more than one sentence.
Never I write more sentence one.
I write never one sentence more.
More than one I sentence never write.
mcQuestions.hint: Adverb of frequency before the verb.

options: I drink water small glass a.
I drink a small glass of water.
Water I small a drink.
A glass small drink I water.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for normal noun phrase order.

options: She light a candle every night.
She lights a candle every night.
She lighting candle every night.
She is light candle every night.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which sentence best fits 'a small daily habit'?
options: I climb a mountain every Tuesday.
I take three deep breaths every morning.
I host a big party each day.
I fly to a new country daily.
mcQuestions.explanation: Deep breaths are a small, doable daily habit.

options: I started this because my work was stressful.
Because work I started this.
I started because stressful.
My work because was started.
mcQuestions.explanation: 'because' introduces a reason after the main clause.

options: The habit is small, but it makes me calm.
Small the habit calm but.
But makes habit small me calm.
Habit but small calm me.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which word fits: 'A small habit makes me ___.'
options: calm
fast
tall
rich quickly
mcQuestions.explanation: 'calm' is a feeling word that fits.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which sentence uses past time correctly?
options: I started this habit two years ago.
Two years ago I will start habit.
I start two years ago habit.
Habit two years ago I starting.
mcQuestions.explanation: Simple past + 'ago' marks a finished past moment.

options: I rarely miss a day, even when I travel.
I rarely missing a day.
Rarely I day missing.
I miss rarely day even travel I.
mcQuestions.explanation: 'rarely' before main verb; 'even when' adds a condition.

criticalThinkingQuestion: Why do small daily habits often change our mood more than big yearly plans?
